system.requirement: The albatross brings luck, while it lives.

abilities.description: Intertwined: When you are on the water, increase your momentum reset by 1. If the albatross is killed, discard this asset and suffer a permanent impact.

Favored: When the albatross flies ahead as you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.edac426b7c23f060]{Finish an Expedition}, its luck is on your side. You may reroll one challenge die.

Auspicious: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} while on the water by asking the spirit embodied by the albatross for a favorable boon, you may roll +its health. If you do, take +1 momentum on a hit. On a strong hit with a match, also mark 1 tick on your bonds legacy track as you deepen your connection to your companion.
